title: Minecraft+ Modpack
description: Minecraft performance and quality of life modpack
body:
Minecraft modpack with QOL and Performance mods.

In this modpack you can:
- Record your gameplay using replays mods
- See your buildings using freecam*
- Easly see the durability of your tools and armor and get warning when it is about to break
- Mouse Improvments with Mouse Wheelie
- Play ANY server version with viafabricplus* (You can even play beta servers without needing to close the game and open other versions!)
- Take 4K Screeshots with FabricShot
- Zoom and do other cool stuff with Essentials Mod
- Do some tweaks with Tweakero* (Like having fake sneak, auto tools and weapons)
- Download the world to see more chunks than the server alows it using Bobby!
- Have a minimap of the world using Journeys Map
- Use shaders with Iris
- Have great performance with Sodium, Starlight, lightium, Cull Less Leaves...

And more!

*Some mods on this modpack can detected by anticheats: I am not responsible for any bans this mod can cause! Use that mods at your own risk.
